assertionResults.reason: Candlestick mode rendered with visible green/red candle bodies and wicks on the chart.
assertionResults.reproductionNotes: Open http://localhost:3102 with Candle mode active and observe OHLC candlestick bars (green/red) with wicks.

assertionResults.reason: Both Candle and Line toggle buttons were visible; clicking Line switched mode and active state, then clicking Candle switched back and restored active state.
assertionResults.reproductionNotes: Click Line chart toggle, confirm Line is active; click Candlestick chart toggle, confirm Candle is active again.

assertionResults.reason: In 1Y view, historical candlestick data spans multiple months (including dates before current live venue period), indicating historical OHLCV is displayed with USD price scale values.
assertionResults.reproductionNotes: Select 1Y range in Candle mode and observe long-span historical candles from prior months through current period.
assertionResults.network: agent-browser network log returned no captured request entries during this run

frictions.description: agent-browser network request inspection returned no captured entries in this session, limiting direct request/response evidence.
frictions.resolution: Used UI-visible chart timespan and mode behavior as primary evidence.

summary: Tested 3 assertions in group A: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
